schemes.benefit_en: Loans Rs 25,000-25 lakh with 25% marginal money grant for youth enterprises
schemes.benefit_hi: युवा उद्यमों के लिए ₹25,000-25 लाख ऋण + 25% मार्जिन मनी अनुदान
schemes.eligibility: UK domicile, age 18-45, education min Class 8

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 900/month for children orphaned by COVID-19 till age 21 + education support
schemes.benefit_hi: COVID से अनाथ बच्चों को 21 वर्ष तक ₹900/माह + शिक्षा सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Children who lost both parents to COVID in Uttarakhand

schemes.benefit_en: Enhanced MGNREGA wages + additional 50 days for hill/remote districts
schemes.benefit_hi: पहाड़ी/दूरस्थ जिलों में बेहतर MGNREGA मजदूरी + 50 अतिरिक्त दिन
schemes.eligibility: MGNREGA job card holders in hilly districts of Uttarakhand

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health insurance for all UK families (extends PM-JAY)
schemes.benefit_hi: सभी UK परिवारों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,000/year additional input support to UK hill farmers on top of PM Kisan
schemes.benefit_hi: PM Kisan के अतिरिक्त पहाड़ी किसानों को ₹2,000/वर्ष

schemes.benefit_en: Interest subsidy + training for rural families to set up homestays for tourists
schemes.benefit_hi: ग्रामीण परिवारों को होमस्टे के लिए ब्याज सब्सिडी + प्रशिक्षण
schemes.eligibility: Rural Uttarakhand families in tourist areas
